findings.description: Off-palette hex #3d2314 used for hero background. DESIGN.md explicitly declares Espresso #2c1810 for 'the / discovery page hero'. The new color is not documented in the palette. Either update DESIGN.md to include the new color with a role description, or revert to #2c1810.

Tests use document.querySelector('footer') instead of Testing Library accessible queries. Prefer screen.getByRole('contentinfo') for the <footer> element to align with Testing Library's guiding principles (query by accessibility role first).
